# ZD Tech

> ZD Tech is an independent creative studio publishing browser games, Roblox games, Sui/Web3 apps, creative tools, and bilingual news updates.

## Canonical Site

- https://www.etboodonline.com/

## Main Sections

- Home: https://www.etboodonline.com/
- Projects: https://www.etboodonline.com/project
- News: https://www.etboodonline.com/news
- Blog: https://www.etboodonline.com/blog
- Contact: https://www.etboodonline.com/contact

## Featured Experiences

- Hot Dance Crew: https://www.etboodonline.com/hotdance/hotdance.html
- Project directory: https://www.etboodonline.com/project

## Topics

- Browser games
- Roblox games
- HTML5 mini games
- Sui blockchain development
- Web3 DApps
- Creative tools
- AI news
- Hot topics
